As a business class passenger with a connecting flight, you are allowed a total of 3 checked bags for your entire itinerary, not 3 bags per segment. Since you have already checked 3 bags on the JFK-ORD leg, you have reached your allowance. You do not get a new 3-bag limit on each flight segment.
